# Examples

Parent: [gnosis-polyglot](../README.md)

Developer tools that exercise the crate's public API. Run with
`cargo run --example <name>`.

## Key Files

- `coverage_report.rs`: AOT-tier coverage report over `gnode/benchmarks/*` — asks each lane's public support surface (Tier A `aot_wasm`, A/C `aot_c`, B `aot_wasm_c`, C `aot_gg_embed`) which exports it claims, and prints per-tier and any-tier totals. Wrapper: `scripts/coverage-report.sh`.
- `dump_topology.rs`: dumps every extracted orchestration topology for a source file — node labels plus the property-carried IR (`expr`/`bind`/`callee`/`args`/`param_names`) and the gg-embed admission verdict per export. The first tool to reach for when auditing what an extractor emits for a new language.

## Verification

`cargo test` compiles both examples; `scripts/coverage-report.sh` runs the report end to end.
